scripts.dev: npm run build -w @fluxroom/shared && concurrently "npm run dev:room" "npm run dev:orch" "npm run dev:agents" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @fluxroom/shared && npm run build -w @fluxroom/room-service && npm run build -w @fluxroom/orchestrator && npm run build -w @fluxroom/agent-runtime && npm run build -w @fluxroom/api
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w @fluxroom/shared && npm run build -w @fluxroom/web
